posts.text: Either Iran's president was misquoted or Pezeshkian and IRGC have completely different messages

posts.text: Talks on reopening the Strait of Hormuz and steering Iran away from its nuclear programme will be bitterly difficult. Any eventual deal will be worse than what could have been struck before the war began https://www.economist.com/leaders/2026/03/26/advantage-iran?taid=69cbf8e9a33d850001ce9fa8&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
BREAKING: Iran's President Pezeshkian says Iran is ready to end the war with the US but wants guarantees.

US stocks are surging on the news.
